name: Bloodseeker
description: You should be honored to bleed so that the Flayed Ones may live.

abilities.name: Sanguivore
abilities.description: The seeker applies a lifesteal-based heal on itself corresponding to the max health of the killed unit. Denying allied heroes heal for the same amount. The self-heal is even less effective when killing creeps.

abilities.name: Bloodrage
abilities.description: Causes the affected unit to attack faster and deal more spell damage at the cost of a percentage of its health per second. Deals pure damage for a percentage of the attacked target's max health.

abilities.name: Blood Rite
abilities.description: The ritual completes after a delay, applying silence while damaging any enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Thirst
abilities.description: Sensing blood of the mortally wounded, Bloodseeker gains bonus movement speed when an enemy hero's health falls below a certain threshold, with the bonuses increasing as their health falls further. These insatiable bonuses stack per hero.

abilities.name: Rupture
abilities.description: Deals an initial damage based on the unit-targeted enemy's current health. If the unit moves, it additionally takes damage based on the distance moved. Attacks on the affected unit now applies a non-disabling forced movement toward the direction Bloodseeker is facing.
